attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CXAUI.TRANSACTION_TYPE,
CXAUI.INVOICE_NUMBER,
CXAUI.INVOICE_CURRENCY,
CXAUI.INVOICE_DATE ,
CXAUI.GL_DATE,
CXAUI.STAGE_ACCOUNTING_DATE,
CXAUI.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER,
CXAUI.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUM,
CXAUI.INVOICE_QUANTITY,
CXAUI.INVOICE_DIST_AMOUNT_TRX_CUR ,
CXAUI.ADV_PMT_AMOUNT ,
CXAUI.PO_HEADER_ID,
CXAUI.CFN_PO_NUMBER,
CXAUI.ARIBA_PO_NUMBER ,
CXAUI.PO_LINE_NUMBER ,
CXAUI.SEGMENT1,
CXAUI.SEGMENT2,
CXAUI.SEGMENT3,
CXAUI.SEGMENT4,
CXAUI.SEGMENT5,
CXAUI.SEGMENT6,
CXAUI.ORG_ID ,
CXAUI.LEDGER_ID ,
CXAUI.STATUS,
CXAUI.INACTIVE_DATE,
CXAUI.INTERCOMPANY_YN,
CXAUI.IC_COMPANY,
CXAUI.IC_LOCATION,
CXAUI.IC_DEPARTMENT,
CXAUI.IC_GL_ACCOUNT,
CXAUI.IC_PROJECT,
CXAUI.IC_SUBACCOUNT,
CXAUI.REQUEST_ID,
CXAUI.REQUEST_DATE ,
CXAUI.ATTRIBUTE1 ,
CXAUI.ATTRIBUTE2 ,
CXAUI.ATTRIBUTE3 ,
CXAUI.ATTRIBUTE4 ,
CXAUI.ATTRIBUTE5 ,
CXAUI.ATTRIBUTE6 ,
CXAUI.ATTRIBUTE7 ,
CXAUI.ATTRIBUTE8 ,
CXAUI.ATTRIBUTE9 ,
CXAUI.ATTRIBUTE10,
CXAUI.CREATION_DATE,
CXAUI.CREATED_BY,
CXAUI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CXAUI.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CXAUI.SUPPLIER_NAME,
CXAUI.INVOICE_LINE_TYPE,
CXAUI.ACCRUAL_CATEGORY ,
CXAUI.INVOICE_LINE_DESC,
CXAUI.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY,
CXAUI.INVOICE_DIST_AMOUNT_FUNC_CUR,
CXAUI.JOURNAL_STATUS,
CXAUI.INVOICE_ID ,
CXAUI.ERROR_CODE ,
CXAUI.ERROR_MESSAGE ,
CXAUI.TAX_RATE,
CXAUI.TAX_CODE,
CXAUI.REQUESTOR,
CXAUI.ORACLE_TAX_CODE,
CXAUI.UNIT_PRICE,
CXAUI.GG_REFERENCE_ID,
CXAUI.GLOBAL_NAME,
CXAUI.GES_UPDATE_DATE 
FROM
OPS$GGADM.CFI_XXCFIA_ARIBA_URAP_INVOICE CXAUI
WHERE CXAUI.GES_UPDATE_DATE>to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
